product_overview: HEFESTO IA is an internal web ERP/CRM combining commercial, financial, operational and administrative modules with role-based access and Supabase-backed authentication. (Refer to the PRD scans on pages 1-3 which show the module list, core modules descriptions and non-functional requirements.)
core_goals: Provide a single unified interface for Sales (CRM), Finance, Operations and Administration with role-based access control.
Deliver a global dashboard with KPIs, visualizations and draggable widgets to surface actionable metrics.
Offer full CRUD management for clients, deals, transactions, tasks and templates with export capabilities (CSV) and recurring/automated flows.
Secure the platform with Supabase authentication, session management, RBAC and middleware-protected routes.
Enable maintainable, performant frontend built in Next.js + TypeScript with reusable components and charts.

features.name: Authentication & Login
features.description: Email/password authentication using Supabase Auth, session handling and middleware-protected routes with role checks.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with {email,password} -> Receive 200 and JWT session -> GET /api/user/profile with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 and user profile with roles
POST /api/auth/login with invalid password -> Receive 401 with error {message:'Invalid credentials'} -> GET /api/user/profile without token -> Receive 401

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Global dashboard exposing KPI cards, charts and sortable/draggable widgets with persistence of widget order.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/kpis with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with KPI payload (revenue, expenses, profit, margins)

POST /api/dashboard/widgets/reorder with {order:[widgetIds]} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 -> GET /api/dashboard/widgets/order with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 and saved order
GET /api/dashboard/kpis without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (middleware redirect to /login)
POST /api/dashboard/widgets/reorder with invalid widget id -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error

features.name: Comercial (CRM & Sales)
features.description: Kanban-style deal pipeline (drag-and-drop), client CRUD, meetings, commissions, seller performance and CSV export.
user_flows: GET /api/comercial/deals?pipeline=true with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with deals grouped by stages (Prospecção, Qualificação, Proposta, Fechado, Perdido)

POST /api/comercial/deals with {title,client_id,value,stage} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 with created deal -> GET /api/comercial/deals/:id with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with deal details
PATCH /api/comercial/deals/:id with {stage:'Proposta'} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> (drag-and-drop stage change) -> Receive 200 and updated deal
POST /api/comercial/deals with missing required field (no client_id) -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with field validation errors
GET /api/comercial/deals/export?format=csv with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 and CSV stream

features.name: Financeiro (Financial Control)
features.description: Transaction management (income/expenses CRUD), recurring payments, tax tracking, DRE reports, goals, budgets and export capabilities.
user_flows: GET /api/financeiro/transactions?from=2026-01-01&to=2026-01-31 with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with transaction list and totals

POST /api/financeiro/transactions with {type:'income',amount,category,date} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 with created transaction -> GET /api/financeiro/transactions/:id -> Receive 200
POST /api/financeiro/recurring with {transaction_template,interval} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 and recurrence id
GET /api/financeiro/dre?year=2026 with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with DRE report data
DELETE /api/financeiro/transactions/:id with Authorization: Bearer <JWT_without_finance_role> -> Receive 403 Forbidden (RBAC prevents deletion)

features.name: Operacional (Operations)
features.description: Kanban task management with columns (A Fazer, Em Progresso, Revisão, Finalizado), drag-and-drop status changes, task CRUD with assignee, priority, difficulty and deadlines.
user_flows: GET /api/operacional/tasks?board=kanban with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with tasks grouped by status
POST /api/operacional/tasks with {title,description,assignee_id,priority,dificuldade,deadline} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 with task id
PATCH /api/operacional/tasks/:id with {status:'Em Progresso'} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> (drag-and-drop) -> Receive 200 with updated task
PATCH /api/operacional/tasks/:id with invalid status value -> Receive 400 Bad Request with error
GET /api/operacional/tasks?due_lte=3d with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 delivering upcoming and overdue tasks (used by Delivery Radar)

features.name: Diretório (Directory)
features.description: Client and collaborator directory with status tracking, subscriptions (mensalidades) and CRUD operations including confirmation modals for destructive actions.
user_flows: GET /api/diretorio/clients with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with clients list (active/inactive states)
POST /api/diretorio/clients with {name,email,status} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 created client
PATCH /api/diretorio/clients/:id with {status:'inactive'} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 and client updated
DELETE /api/diretorio/clients/:id with active_subscriptions=true and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 409 Conflict with message 'Client has active subscriptions'
GET /api/diretorio/colaboradores with Authorization: Bearer <JWT_admin> -> Receive 200 with collaborators list and module access flags

features.name: Configurações (Settings)
features.description: User and team management with RBAC roles (admin/member/viewer), module-level access control, commission tiers and system configuration.
user_flows: GET /api/configuracoes/users with Authorization: Bearer <JWT_admin> -> Receive 200 with full users list and roles
POST /api/configuracoes/users with {email,role,modules:[...]} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT_admin> -> Receive 201 new user and invitation link
PATCH /api/configuracoes/users/:id with {role:'member'} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT_admin> -> Receive 200 role updated
PATCH /api/configuracoes/users/:id with {role:'admin'} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT_non_admin> -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Calendário (Calendar)
features.description: Calendar grid combining commercial meetings, administrative events and operational deadlines with event creation and conflict checks.
user_flows: GET /api/calendario/events?rangeStart=2026-02-01&rangeEnd=2026-02-28 with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with events
POST /api/calendario/events with {title,start,end,participants} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 created event
POST /api/calendario/events with conflicting participant times -> Receive 409 Conflict with conflict details

features.name: Chat
features.description: Internal messaging system for conversations and messages between collaborators (future real-time integration planned).
user_flows: GET /api/chat/conversations with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with list of conversation summaries
POST /api/chat/conversations with {participant_ids,subject} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 with conversation id
POST /api/chat/conversations/:id/messages with {text} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 message created
POST /api/chat/conversations/:id/messages with sender not in participants -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Templates
features.description: Manage reusable document/email templates and 'Useful Links' with category management and CRUD.
user_flows: GET /api/templates with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with templates and categories
POST /api/templates with {title,body,category_id} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 template created
POST /api/templates/categories with {name} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201
POST /api/templates/categories with duplicate name -> Receive 409 Conflict

features.name: Administrativo (Administrative)
features.description: Administrative demands, internal meetings (Kanban) and history viewer for audit logs.
user_flows: GET /api/administrativo/demandas with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 demands list
POST /api/administrativo/demandas with {title,description,assigned_to} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 created demand
GET /api/administrativo/history?entity=demandas with Authorization: Bearer <JWT_admin> -> Receive 200 audit logs
GET /api/administrativo/demandas with Authorization: Bearer <JWT_without_permission> -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Notification center with bell indicator, history page and real-time notification support (future).
user_flows: GET /api/notificacoes/unread_count with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with unread_count integer (used to render bell badge)
GET /api/notificacoes with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with notification history paginated
POST /api/notificacoes/mark-read with {ids:[...]} and Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 confirming mark-read
POST /api/notificacoes/mark-read with non_existent_id -> Receive 404 Not Found for that id

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Collapsible sidebar providing navigation to all modules, user avatar, notification bell and logout action; menu is tailored by user permissions.
user_flows: GET /api/user/profile with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with user info and module access flags -> Client renders sidebar with permitted links
POST /api/auth/logout with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 and session cleared -> Client redirects to /login
GET /api/user/profile with expired token -> Receive 401 -> Client collapses sidebar and redirects to /login

features.name: Authentication & Login
features.description: Supabase-based email/password login with session management and middleware-protected routes

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Global dashboard with KPI cards showing financial metrics (revenue, expenses, profit, margins), overdue task tracking, and multiple chart widgets (bar, line, pie, area). Widgets are sortable via drag-and-drop.

routes.description: Main dashboard with draggable KPI widgets and charts

features.name: Comercial (CRM & Sales)
features.description: Full CRM module with Kanban board for deal pipeline management (stages like Prospecção, Qualificação, Proposta, Fechado, Perdido). Includes client management (CRUD), deal creation/editing, meetings, feedback, commission tracking, seller performance, and CSV export.

routes.description: Kanban board with deals, clients tab, meetings, commissions, and dashboard analytics

features.name: Financeiro (Financial Control)
features.description: Financial module with transaction management (income/expenses CRUD), recurring payments, tax management, DRE reports, financial goals, budget planning, and chart visualizations. Includes CSV export and custom confirmation modals.

routes.description: Financial transactions, taxes, recurrences, goals & planning tabs

features.name: Operacional (Operations)
features.description: Operations task management with Kanban board (columns - A Fazer, Em Progresso, Revisão, Finalizado). Tasks with drag-and-drop to change status, task creation/editing with title, description, assignee, priority, difficulty, and deadline tracking.

routes.description: Kanban board for operational task management

features.name: Diretório (Directory)
features.description: Directory module for managing clients and collaborators. Includes client list with status tracking (active/inactive), collaborator management, search functionality, and CRUD operations with custom confirmation dialogs.

routes.description: Client and collaborator directory with tabs

features.name: Configurações (Settings)
features.description: User and team management with role-based permissions (admin/member/viewer). Module access control, commission tier management (patentes/faixas), commercial team members, transaction types/categories, and notification settings.

routes.description: User management, permissions, commission settings, and system configuration

features.name: Calendário (Calendar)
features.description: Calendar view for scheduling and viewing events

features.name: Chat
features.description: Internal messaging/chat system

features.name: Templates
features.description: Template management for document models and useful links, with category management

features.name: Administrativo (Administrative)
features.description: Administrative module

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Notification system with bell indicator, notification history page, and real-time notifications

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Collapsible sidebar with navigation to all modules, user avatar, notification bell, and logout functionality

routes.description: Layout wrapping all pages with sidebar navigation

known_limitations.issue: All pages are client-side rendered with 'use client' directive
known_limitations.impact: No SSR benefits for SEO or initial load performance

known_limitations.issue: Large monolithic page components (comercial has 3000+ lines)
known_limitations.impact: Maintenance complexity and potential performance issues
